addSecret(string).details: For demo we simply cast the string to bytes and store.

returns.secret: The revealed secret as plain bytes.

addSecret(string).notice: Add a secret to the pool. The secret is stored as shielded bytes.

hit().notice: Hit the clown, reducing its stamina by 1.

reset().notice: Reset the clown for a new round. Only callable when clown is down.

rob().notice: Rob the secret after the clown is down. Only contributors can call.

robAndReward().notice: Rob the secret and transfer 1 SRC20 token as reward.
